creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #2)
Thanks.  These all need to be patched.  I did that locally here:
https://github.com/markjdb/freebsd-ports/tree/main-copyinout-checking

Most of those ports don't have maintainers so I'm not sure how to get them approved.  I did create one review: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D43273

Would it be possible to retry with these patches, and see if any other kmods fail?
